query: SELECT id, fileName, fileType, analysisStatus, detectedLanguage, JSON_LENGTH(analysisResult) as resultKeys, SUBSTRING(analysisResult, 1, 500) as resultPreview FROM ad_report_files WHERE analysisStatus = 'completed' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 3;
